statement.en: Color phenotyping and genome-wide association studies of raspberry fruit quality
statement.summary: The full abstract for this thesis is available in the body of the thesis, and will be available when the embargo expires.

reiTyping.dfumt8Reason: This is a provisional thesis document (embargoed, abstract unavailable) describing empirical research combining phenotyping and genomic association studies. The work is pre-validation and under embargo, preventing full evaluation of claims. The methodology (GWAS + color phenotyping) is established, but thesis-specific findings remain unvetted.

ramanujanFormula.latex: \int_0^\infty e^{-\lambda c(x)} \cdot g(x) \, dx = \sum_{k=1}^n p_k \cdot f_k
ramanujanFormula.interpretation: 色は遺伝子の果てしない積分であり、光と染色体が踊りながら形質を刻む。

visualGlyph.interpretation: ゲノムの光の網に色が宿り、各点は形質の秘密の共鳴を映す。
